H7900.derivation: from H5526 (סָכַךְ) in the sense of H7753 (שׂוּךְ);

H7901.strongs_def: to lie down (for rest, sexual connection, decease or any other purpose)
H7901.kjv_def: [idiom] at all, cast down, (lover-)lay (self) (down), (make to) lie (down, down to sleep, still with), lodge, ravish, take rest, sleep, stay.

H7902.strongs_def: a lying down (of dew, or for the sexual act)

H7904.kjv_def: in the morning (by mistake for H7925 (שָׁכַם)).

H7905.derivation: feminine of H7900 (שֹׂךְ) in the sense of H7899 (שֵׂךְ);
H7905.strongs_def: a dart (as pointed like a thorn)

H7906.derivation: from an unused root apparently meaning to surmount; an observatory (with the article);

H7910.strongs_def: intoxicated, as astate or a habit

H7911.strongs_def: to mislay, i.e. to be oblivious of, from want of memory or attention

H7912.derivation: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7911 (שָׁכַח) through the idea of disclosure of a covered or forgotten thing;

H7914.derivation: feminine from the same as H7906 (שֵׂכוּ);

H7915.derivation: intensive perhaps from the same as H7906 (שֵׂכוּ) in the sense of H7753 (שׂוּךְ);

H7916.strongs_def: a man at wages  by the day or year

H7918.strongs_def: to weave (i.e. lay) a trap; figuratively, (through the idea of secreting) to allay (passions; physically, abate a flood)
H7918.kjv_def: appease, assuage, make to cease, pacify, set.

H7919.strongs_def: to be (causatively, make or act) circumspect and hence, intelligent
H7919.kjv_def: consider, expert, instruct, prosper, (deal) prudent(-ly), (give) skill(-ful), have good success, teach, (have, make to) understand(-ing), wisdom, (be, behave self, consider, make) wise(-ly), guide wittingly.
H7919.usage: understand(12x), wise(12x), prosper(8x), wisely(6x), understanding(5x), consider(4x), instruct(3x), prudent(2x), skill(2x), teach(2x)

H7920.strongs_def: {to be (causatively, make or act) circumspect and hence, intelligent}

H7921.strongs_def: properly, to miscarry, i.e. suffer abortion; by analogy, to bereave (literally or figuratively)
H7921.kjv_def: bereave (of children), barren, cast calf (fruit, young), be (make) childless, deprive, destroy, [idiom] expect, lose children, miscarry, rob of children, spoil.

H7922.kjv_def: discretion, knowledge, policy, prudence, sense, understanding, wisdom, wise.
H7922.usage: understanding(7x), wisdom(3x), wise(1x), prudence(1x), knowledge(1x), sense(1x), discretion(1x), policy(1x)

H7923.kjv_def: to have after loss of others.

H7925.derivation: a primitive root; properly, to incline (the shoulder to a burden); but used only as denominative from H7926 (שְׁכֶם);
H7925.strongs_def: literally, to load up (on the back of man or beast), i.e. to start early in the morning
H7925.kjv_def: (arise, be up, get (oneself) up, rise up) early (betimes), morning.

H7926.strongs_def: the neck (between the shoulders) as the place of burdens; figuratively, the spur of ahill

H7927.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H7928.strongs_def: Shekem, the name of a Hivite and two Israelites

H7930.strongs_def: a Shikmite (collectively), or descendants of Shekem

H7931.derivation: a primitive root (apparently akin (by transmission) to H7901 (שָׁכַב) through the idea of lodging; compare H5531 (סִכְלוּת), H7925 (שָׁכַם));
H7931.strongs_def: to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively)
H7931.kjv_def: abide, continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-er), have habitation, inhabit, lay, place, (cause to) remain, rest, set (up).
H7931.usage: dwell(92x), abide(8x), place(7x), remain(5x), inhabit(4x), rest(3x), set(2x), continue(1x), dwellers(1x), dwelling(1x)

H7932.strongs_def: {to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively)}

H7934.strongs_def: a resident; by extension, a fellow-citizen

H7935.derivation: or (prolonged) שְׁכַנְיָהוּ; from H7931 (שָׁכַן) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has dwelt;
H7935.strongs_def: Shekanjah, the name of nine Israelites

H7936.derivation: or (by permutation) סָכַר; (Ezra 4:5), a primitive root (apparently akin (by prosthesis) to H3739 (כָּרָה) through the idea of temporary purchase; compare H7937 (שָׁכַר));
H7936.kjv_def: earn wages, hire (out self), reward, [idiom] surely.

H7937.strongs_def: to become tipsy; in a qualified sense, to satiate with astimulating drink or (figuratively) influence
H7937.kjv_def: (be filled with) drink (abundantly), (be, make) drunk(-en), be merry. (Superlative of H8248 (שָׁקָה).)

H7939.strongs_def: payment of contract; concretely, salary, fare, maintenance; by implication, compensation, benefit
H7939.usage: hire(9x), reward(9x), wages(6x), price(2x), fare(1x), worth(1x)

H7940.strongs_def: Sakar, the name of two Israelites

H7941.strongs_def: an intoxicant, i.e. intensely alcoholic liquor

H7942.strongs_def: drunkenness, Shikkeron, a place in Palestine

H7945.derivation: for the rel. H834 (אֲשֶׁר); used with prepositional prefix, and often followed by some pronominal affix;

H7947.strongs_def: to space off; intensive (evenly) to make equidistant

H7948.strongs_def: a spacer or raised interval, i.e. the stile in aframe or panel

H7949.derivation: a primitive root; properly, meaning to be white; used only as denominative from H7950 (שֶׁלֶג);
H7949.strongs_def: to be snow-white (with the linen clothing of the slain)

H7951.strongs_def: to be tranquil, i.e. secure or successful
H7951.kjv_def: be happy, prosper, be in safety.

H7952.derivation: a primitive root (probably identical with H7953 (שָׁלָה) through the idea of educing);

H7953.derivation: a primitive root (rather cognate (by contraction) to the base of H5394 (נָשַׁל), H7997 (שָׁלַל) and their congeners through the idea of extracting);
H7953.strongs_def: to draw out or off, i.e. remove (the soul by death)

H7955.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H7952 (שָׁלָה);

H7956.strongs_def: Shelah, the name of a postdiluvian patriarch and of an Israelite

H7957.derivation: from the same as H3851 (לַהַב) with sibilant prefix;

H7958.derivation: or שְׂלָיו; by orthographical variation from H7951 (שָׁלָה) through the idea of sluggishness;
H7958.strongs_def: the quail collectively (as slow in flight from its weight)

H7960.derivation: (Aramaic) or שָׁלוּת; (Aramaic), from the same as H7955 (שָׁלָה);

H7961.derivation: or שָׁלֵיו; feminine שְׁלֵוָה; from H7951 (שָׁלָה);
H7961.strongs_def: tranquil; (in a bad sense) careless; abstractly, security
H7961.kjv_def: (being) at ease, peaceable, (in) prosper(-ity), quiet(-ness), wealthy.
H7961.usage: peaceable(1x), quietness(1x), prosperity(1x), quiet(1x), prosper(1x), wealthy(1x)

H7964.strongs_def: (only in plural) a dismissal, i.e. (of a wife) divorce (especially the document); also (of a daughter) dower

H7965.strongs_def: safe, i.e. (figuratively) well, happy, friendly; also (abstractly) welfare, i.e. health, prosperity, peace
H7965.kjv_def: [idiom] do, familiar, [idiom] fare, favour, [phrase] friend, [idiom] great, (good) health, ([idiom] perfect, such as be at) peace(-able, -ably), prosper(-ity, -ous), rest, safe(-ty), salute, welfare, ([idiom] all is, be) well, [idiom] wholly.
H7965.usage: peace(175x), well(14x), peaceably(9x), welfare(5x), prosperity(4x), did(3x), safe(3x), health(2x), peaceable(2x)

H7966.strongs_def: a requital, i.e. (secure) retribution, (venal) a fee

H7967.derivation: or (shorter) שַׁלֻּם; the same as H7966 (שִׁלּוּם);
H7967.strongs_def: Shallum, the name of fourteen Israelites

H7969.derivation: or שָׁלֹשׁ; masculine שְׁלוֹשָׁה; or שְׁלֹשָׁה; a primitive number;
H7969.kjv_def: [phrase] fork, [phrase] often(-times), third, thir(-teen, -teenth), three, [phrase] thrice. Compare H7991 (שָׁלִישׁ).

H7971.strongs_def: to send away, for, or out (in a great variety of applications)
H7971.kjv_def: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring (on the way), cast (away, out), conduct, [idiom] earnestly, forsake, give (up), grow long, lay, leave, let depart (down, go, loose), push away, put (away, forth, in, out), reach forth, send (away, forth, out), set, shoot (forth, out), sow, spread, stretch forth (out).
H7971.usage: send(566x), go(73x), lay(14x), put(10x), cast(5x), set(5x), depart(4x), soweth(3x), loose(3x)

H7972.strongs_def: {to send away, for, or out (in a great variety of applications)}

H7973.strongs_def: a missile of attack, i.e. spear; also (figuratively) a shoot of growth; i.e. branch
H7973.kjv_def: dart, plant, [idiom] put off, sword, weapon.

H7974.kjv_def: Salah, Shelah. Compare H7975 (שִׁלֹחַ)lemma שִׁלֹּחַ extra dagesh, corrected to שִׁלֹחַ.

H7975.derivation: or (in imitation of H7974 (שֶׁלַח)) שֶׁלַח; (Nehemiah 3:15), from H7971 (שָׁלַח); rill;

H7978.derivation: plural of H7973 (שֶׁלַח); javelins or sprouts;

H7979.strongs_def: a table (as spread out); by implication, a meal

H7980.strongs_def: to dominate, i.e. govern; by implication, to permit
H7980.kjv_def: (bear, have) rule, have dominion, give (have) power.

H7981.strongs_def: {to dominate, i.e. govern; by implication, to permit}
H7981.kjv_def: have the mastery, have power, bear rule, be (make) ruler.

H7982.strongs_def: probably a shield (as controlling, i.e. protecting the person)

H7984.derivation: (Aramaic) or שִׁלְטֹןlemma שִׁלְטן missing vowel, corrected to שִׁלְטֹן; corresponding to H7983 (שִׁלְטוֹן)

H7988.strongs_def: a fetus or babe (as extruded in birth)

H7989.strongs_def: potent; concretely, a prince or warrior
H7989.kjv_def: governor, mighty, that hath power, ruler.

H7990.strongs_def: mighty; abstractly, permission; concretely, a premier

H7991.derivation: or שָׁלוֹשׁ; (1 Chronicles 11:11; 1 Chronicles 12:18), or שָׁלֹשׁ; (2 Samuel 23:13), from H7969 (שָׁלוֹשׁ);
H7991.strongs_def: a triple, i.e. (as a musical instrument) a triangle (or perhaps rather threestringed lute); also (as an indefinite, great quantity) a three-fold measure (perhaps a treble ephah); also (as an officer) a general of the third rank (upward, i.e. the highest)
H7991.kjv_def: captain, instrument of musick, (great) lord, (great) measure, prince, three (from the margin).

H7992.strongs_def: third; feminine athird (part); by extension, a third (day, year or time); specifically, a third-story cell)

H7993.strongs_def: to throw out, down or away (literally or figuratively)
H7993.kjv_def: adventure, cast (away, down, forth, off, out), hurl, pluck, throw.

H7994.strongs_def: bird of prey, usually thought to be the pelican (from casting itself into the sea)

H7997.strongs_def: to drop or strip; by implication, to plunder
H7997.kjv_def: let fall, make self a prey, [idiom] of purpose, (make a, (take)) spoil.

H7999.strongs_def: to be safe (in mind, body or estate); figuratively, to be (causatively, make) completed; by implication, to be friendly; by extension, to reciprocate (in various applications)
H7999.kjv_def: make amends, (make an) end, finish, full, give again, make good, (re-) pay (again), (make) (to) (be at) peace(-able), that is perfect, perform, (make) prosper(-ous), recompense, render, requite, make restitution, restore, reward, [idiom] surely.
H7999.usage: pay(19x), peace(11x), recompense(11x), reward(10x), render(9x), restore(8x), repay(7x), perform(7x), good(6x), end(4x), requite(4x), restitution(4x), finished(3x), again(3x), amends(1x), full(1x)
